meta.title: Optim – Insurance & Expenses | Manage your policies easily
meta.description: Optim helps you manage all your insurance policies and recurring expenses in one place. Get renewal alerts and optimize your coverage.
meta.ogDescription: The mobile app that centralizes your insurance policies, recurring expenses and alerts you before renewals. Available for Android.

hero.title: Take control of all your insurance
hero.subtitle: Optim centralizes your insurance policies, subscriptions and recurring expenses. Never miss a renewal and optimize what you pay.
hero.trustedBy: Thousands of users already optimizing their expenses

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Tools designed to simplify the management of your insurance and expenses every day.

items.title: Insurance Management
items.description: Centralize all your policies in a single dashboard. Home, car, life, health and more, always at a glance.

items.title: Renewal Alerts
items.description: Receive smart notifications before your policies expire. Never be caught off guard by a renewal again.

items.title: Expense Analytics
items.description: Visualize how much you spend on insurance and subscriptions each month. Identify savings opportunities at a glance.

items.title: Multiple Providers
items.description: Compatible with any insurer or provider. Add your policies regardless of who issued them.

items.title: Secure & Private
items.description: Your data is protected with end-to-end encryption. Your information is yours and no one else's.

items.title: Recurring Expenses
items.description: Record services, subscriptions and any periodic expense. Always have total control of your finances.

howItWorks.title: Get started in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No complications. In three steps you will have total control of your insurance and expenses.

steps.title: Download the app
steps.description: Available for free on Google Play. Install Optim in seconds and create your account.

steps.title: Add your policies
steps.description: Enter your insurance policies and recurring expenses. You only need the basic details for each policy.

steps.title: Get alerts and save
steps.description: Optim notifies you before each renewal and shows you where you can optimize your spending.

screenshots.title: Designed to be simple
screenshots.subtitle: A clean, intuitive interface that gives you control without overwhelming you with unnecessary information.

items.caption: Your summary at a glance. See how many contracts are active and which ones expire soon.
All your contracts at a glance. Sorted by renewal date so nothing slips through.
Know your real spend. Monthly and estimated annual, so you can make informed decisions.
Renew or modify with a tap. No paperwork, no hassle, done in seconds.

serviceCategories.title: For all your recurring expenses
serviceCategories.subtitle: Not just insurance. Optim centralizes everything you pay periodically in one single place.

cta.title: Start optimizing today
cta.subtitle: Take control of all your insurance and utilities. Free, no subscription, no ads.

footer.tagline: Manage your insurance and expenses with intelligence.

waitlist.title: Early access for testers
waitlist.subtitle: We're opening access to a small group. Sign up and we'll let you know when your spot is ready.
waitlist.successDetail: We've sent you a confirmation link. Click it to complete your registration.
waitlist.alreadyConfirmed: This email is already on the list. Thanks for your interest.
waitlist.confirmationResent: We already had your email. We've resent the confirmation link.
waitlist.errorValidation: The email is not valid. Please check it and try again.
waitlist.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please try again in an hour.
waitlist.errorServer: Something went wrong. Please try again.
waitlist.confirmSuccess: Email confirmed. You're on the list.

waitlistPage.title: Be the first to try Optim
waitlistPage.subtitle: We haven't officially launched yet. We're opening early access to a small group of testers who want to help us shape the app.
bullets: Access the app before the official launch
Your feedback helps shape the product
No commitment — unsubscribe whenever you want
waitlistPage.privacyNote: We'll only use your email to notify you about the app. No spam, no third-party sharing.
waitlistPage.metaDescription: Join the Optim waitlist and be among the first to try the app before its official launch.
